_description: Patterns commonly considered sensitive cardholder data under PCI DSS.
_disclaimer: Using this profile does not constitute PCI DSS compliance. It only enables redaction of patterns commonly considered sensitive cardholder data. PCI DSS compliance requires controls far beyond log redaction.

patterns.name: pan-luhn
patterns.notes: PAN candidate: 13 to 19 digits with optional space or dash separators. Final acceptance gated by Luhn validator (digits-only). CVVs alone (3-4 digits) are too short to safely pattern-match; PCI DSS requires CVVs not be stored at all, so logging a stray CVV is a separate workflow problem.
